basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Port Authority (MbPA) has published the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) positions. Candidates up to 42 years of age and holding a Degree or equivalent qualification in Civil Engineering are eligible to apply online at mumbaiport.gov.in. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 09 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and apply link below.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engg.
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engg. from a recognised University/Institution Twelve years experience in executive cadre in Planning/Constn./Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures in an Industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking.

selection_process: Selection by merit Overall grading in APARs should not be below "Very Good"
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mumbai Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mumbai Port Authority to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Mumbai Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment is 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post in the Mumbai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) position is 42 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 80000-220000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of job being offered?
faq.answer: The job type offered is Deputation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Civil) role?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit, and the overall grading in APARs should not be below "Very Good".

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
